response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and DLang developer but lacks the deep, recent C++ expertise required for this role. With only 7 months of professional C++ experience from nearly a decade ago and no background in industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) or industrial automation protocols, they do not meet the core technical requirements.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) across full-stack, backend, and open-source development.
Strong background in building high-performance, low-latency, and event-driven architectures.
Proven leadership and mentoring capabilities, demonstrated through organizing workshops and founding platforms.
concerns: Severe lack of recent C++ experience, with only 7 months of professional exposure nearly a decade ago.
No mentioned experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA) or IoT message brokers like MQTT.
Lacks required knowledge of industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) and specific Secure Development Lifecycle practices.
